name: Hazlnut Squash Ravioli Filling
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F.
Cut the squash into quarters, removing seeds. Place in a baking dish with half a cup of water. Cover and bake until tender. Cool and then scrape out the flesh, mashing it. Set aside.
Increase oven temperature to 375°F.
Place hazelnuts on a cookie sheet and roast until lightly browned, about 7 minutes. Let cool and rub off their skins.
Saute onion and garlic in oil until browned. Add one cup of squash and cook for 2 minutes over medium heat. Transfer all ingredients to a food processor and process until smooth.
Use to fill pasta dough of your choice and cook as desired.
Vegetarian Gourmet, Spring 1994
